name: Test databao build with Postgres
description: Initialize a project with Postgres and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.
descriptionHtml: Initialize a project with Postgres and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

testStage.description: Initialize a project with Postgres and build it, then compare results with expected introspection.

steps.name: Answering prompt ''What type of datasource do you want to add\?'' with ''postgres''

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.value: 'What type of datasource do you want to add\?'

steps.name: Answering prompt ''Do you want to check the connection to this new datasource\? \[y/N\]:'' with ''y''

parameters.name: pattern
parameters.value: 'Do you want to check the connection to this new datasource\? \[y/N\]:'

parameters.name: database
parameters.value: PostgresDB(datasource_name='my_postgres', host='localhost', port=32770, database='test', user='test', password='test', check_connection=True, check_connection_succeed=True)
